caption:
The red ants are no joke 🐜 ⚠️ 😂

#floridians #relatableflorida #funnyflorida #donotmovetoflorida

transcription.text: Do not move to Florida. There's water moccasins everywhere, snakes, alligators, tornadoes, sharks, hurricanes, heat, humidity, mosquitoes, fleas, ticks, red ants. Don't move to Florida. It's horrible.
